title: CBOM — Content Bill of Materials
description: Content-addressed provenance manifest for an orchestration run. Every hash is sha256 of canonical JSON (jq -S -c). Two runs over identical inputs (struct.json + macros + code at the same SHAs) must produce bit-identical CBOMs; 'reproducible' is computed by comparing the current CBOM to the previous run's CBOM (if any).

generated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp; excluded from hash to allow bit-identical re-runs at different times.

context_slices.description: Per-leaf context slices produced by Bound.

sources.description: File paths that contributed to this slice.

code_hashes.description: Map of file path -> sha256:<hex>. Includes all source files referenced by the plan.

gate.description: Optional Gate result (the merge-gate verdict if Gate was run).

reproducible.description: true if all per-run hashes match the previous run's CBOM hashes; false if any differ; null if no previous CBOM exists.

diff.description: If this CBOM was compared against a previous one, the symmetric diff is recorded here.
